menu.title: Menu
menu.intro: All prices in euros, incl. VAT.
menu.allergensIntro: Labelling according to the Food Information Regulation.
menu.noItems: There are currently no dishes in this category.

location.title: Location
location.mapConsentText: To protect your data, the map is only loaded after your consent. Data will be transferred to OpenStreetMap.

cookie.text: We only use technically necessary cookies. External content such as maps is only loaded after your consent.
cookie.statusAccepted: Your current choice: external content allowed.
cookie.statusDeclined: Your current choice: necessary cookies only.

login.title: Meraki CMS
login.subtitle: Please sign up to manage content.
login.errorInvalid: Registration failed. Please check access data.

idleLogout.title: Still registered?
idleLogout.before: For safety reasons, you will be in

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.welcome: Welcome to the administrative area of Taverna Zeus.
dashboard.settingsDesc: Address, telephone, email, card, hero image.
dashboard.pagesDesc: Imprint, data protection and other pages.
dashboard.translationsDesc: State of automatic translations, fill gaps collected.

translationsPanel.title: Other languages
translationsPanel.subtitle: (automatically translated)
translationsPanel.description: German is the source. Empty fields are automatically translated when stored; Values entered here are retained.

errors.selfParent: A category cannot be assigned to itself.
errors.categoryHasChildren: This category has subcategories and cannot itself be assigned to a category.
errors.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must have at least 8 characters.
errors.accountNotFound: No account found with this email. Create as an admin first.

categories.title: Categories
categories.subtitle: Main and subcategories of the menu.
categories.deleteConfirm: Delete category including subcategories and food?

allergens.title: Allergens and additives
allergens.subtitle: Manage definitions that can be assigned to food.
allergens.deleteAllergenConfirm: Delete allergen and also remove it from all assigned foods?
allergens.deleteAdditiveConfirm: Delete additive and also remove it from all assigned food?

transfer.title: Import / Export
transfer.description: Secure the complete menu as a ZIP package – including all pictures – or play back a previously exported package.
transfer.importConfirm: Import replaces the complete menu. Continue?

pages.title: Pages
pages.subtitle: Imprint, data protection and other pages.

hours.title: Opening hours
hours.subtitle: Set times per weekday.
hours.hint: Note: The editor manages one time period per day. Multiple spans (e.g. lunch break) can be supplemented if necessary.

settings.title: Location & Contact
settings.subtitle: Address, contact details, card and hero image.
settings.mapEmbedHint: Leave blank, then the card is automatically generated from the address above when it is saved. Alternatively, insert your own URL — on openstreetmap.org: Search address → on the right “Share” → Check marks on “Marker” → Format “HTML” → Only the URL from the

admins.title: Admins
admins.intro: Anyone who is listed here may edit content. When creating, a login account with password is created.
admins.passwordDisabledBody: To create accounts with a password or change passwords, enter the service role secret (Supabase → Project Settings → API) as SUPABASE SERVICE ROLE KEY in .env.local and restart the server. Without the key, emails can only be unlocked (account must then exist separately).
admins.createHint: Create a confirmed account and unlock it. The person can immediately log in with email and password.

translationsPage.title: Translations
translationsPage.intro: German is the source language. When saving, empty languages are automatically filled via LibreTranslate — here you can see the status of all content and translate gaps collected.
translationsPage.sourceLanguageNote: German is the source language and always active.
translationsPage.uiTextsIntro: Menu, buttons and messages from the admin area and website itself — separate from the content above.
translationsPage.footerHint: Note: Machine-generated texts can be post-edited per entry in the “Other languages” section of the respective form. Manually entered values are never overwritten.

localesForm.hint: When a new language is activated, surface text and content are automatically translated via LibreTranslate. When deactivated, existing translations remain.
